scheme_name: PM-USP Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University Students
description: Merit-cum-means scholarship support for higher education.
eligibility: Eligible students meeting academic and income criteria.
application_process: Apply through National Scholarship Portal / official process.
documents_required: Academic records; income proof; ID proof; bank details.

description: Scholarship for professional and technical education.
eligibility: As per PMSS eligibility rules.
documents_required: Service proof; academic records; bank details.

description: Scholarship support for meritorious students from economically weaker sections.
eligibility: Eligible school students under scheme rules.

scheme_name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
description: Financial assistance for school education.
eligibility: Students with benchmark disabilities under scheme rules.

scheme_name: Post-Matric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
description: Financial assistance for post-school education.
eligibility: Students with benchmark disabilities under scheme rules.
documents_required: Disability certificate; academic records; ID proof.

scheme_name: Top Class Education for Students with Disabilities
description: Support for quality higher education.
eligibility: Eligible students in approved institutions.
documents_required: Admission proof; disability certificate; income proof.

description: Income support to eligible farmer families.
eligibility: Landholding farmers under PM-KISAN rules.

description: Crop insurance support against yield loss.
eligibility: Farmers cultivating notified crops in notified areas.

description: Short-term credit support for agriculture and allied activities.
eligibility: Eligible farmers and allied activity beneficiaries.

description: Provides soil nutrient status and fertilizer recommendations.
eligibility: Farmers under soil sampling programme.

description: Support for beekeeping value chain and productivity.
eligibility: Eligible beneficiaries under mission guidelines.

description: Bank loans for greenfield enterprises.
eligibility: Eligible women/SC/ST entrepreneurs.
application_process: Apply through bank / Stand Up India portal.

description: Credit-linked subsidy for micro-enterprise setup.
eligibility: Eligible individuals/institutions under PMEGP rules.
documents_required: Project report; KYC; education proof where applicable.

scheme_name: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises
description: Collateral-free credit guarantee support.
eligibility: Eligible MSME borrowers via member lending institutions.

description: Seed funding support for eligible startups.
eligibility: DPIIT-recognized startups under scheme rules.
documents_required: Pitch deck; incorporation documents; startup details.

description: Loans for non-corporate small business sector.
eligibility: Eligible small business borrowers.

description: Maternity benefit support for first/live birth conditions as applicable.
eligibility: Eligible women under scheme rules.

description: Campaign and convergence initiative for welfare of the girl child.
eligibility: Implemented through district/state mechanisms.

description: Integrated support and assistance services.
eligibility: Women affected by violence.

description: Safe accommodation support for working women.
eligibility: Eligible working women under scheme rules.

scheme_name: National Social Assistance Programme - Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
description: Social pension support.
eligibility: Eligible elderly persons under NSAP rules.

description: Pension scheme for income security in old age.
eligibility: Eligible age group subscribers under APY rules.
documents_required: KYC; bank account; Aadhaar if required.

description: Assistive devices for senior citizens belonging to identified groups.
eligibility: Eligible senior citizens under scheme rules.
documents_required: Age proof; income/BPL related proof; medical assessment.

description: Support for rehabilitation services through NGOs.
eligibility: Eligible implementing agencies/beneficiaries as per scheme rules.

scheme_name: Assistance to Disabled Persons for Purchase/Fitting of Aids and Appliances
description: Helps in obtaining durable aids and assistive devices.
eligibility: Eligible persons with disabilities under income criteria.

description: One-time assistance on death of primary breadwinner.
eligibility: Eligible BPL households under NSAP rules.

description: Food security support for eligible elderly persons not receiving pension.
eligibility: Eligible indigent senior citizens under state implementation.
